title: What Health Actually Is
body:
Health is more than not being sick. It includes the state of the body, the mind, and the surrounding environment that makes wellbeing possible.

A health system is the network of prevention, diagnosis, treatment, recovery, and support that helps people stay well or get well again.

Health is therefore a topic where biology and policy meet. A person’s habits matter, but access, infrastructure, and social conditions often matter just as much.

The field is broad because life itself is broad.
keyPoints: Health includes physical and mental wellbeing
Health is both personal and institutional
furtherReading: The Emperor of All Maladies by Siddhartha Mukherjee
The Body Keeps the Score by Bessel van der Kolk
